ValidationRule.description: If not a Duplicate & Type of Case = Complaint Internal & Complaint Justification = null
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( OR(RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GhBb' /* DX Software Services */ ,RecordTypeId = '0123A000001GjKo') /* EMEA L2 */ ,NOT(PKI_GLB_Duplicate_Case__c) ,AND(ISPICKVAL(TypeOfCase__c, 'Complaint - Internal') ,ISPICKVAL(DX_Complaint_Justification__c,'') ) )
